goal_text:
You are traveling to Cambridge and looking forward to try local restaurants.
You are looking for a place to dine. The restaurant should serve 'african' food and should be in the 'centre'.
The restaurant should be in the 'expensive' price range.
Make sure you get 'postcode'.
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of 'museum' and should be 'in the same area as the restaurant'.
Make sure you get 'postcode'.Remember. You don't want booking for restaurant. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are traveling to Cambridge and looking forward to try local restaurants
You are looking for a place to dine. The restaurant should serve african food and should be in the centre
The restaurant should be in the expensive price range
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of museum and should be in the same area as the restaurant
